en.seo.title: ProcessTimeline qualification fixture
en.process.title: A clear path from duty point to delivery
en.process.step1.title: Confirm the operating duty
en.process.step1.body: Review flow, pressure, fluid, temperature and installation constraints.
en.process.step2.title: Align the technical specification
en.process.step2.body: Set materials, sealing, testing and documentation requirements.
en.process.step3.title: Plan delivery and support
en.process.step3.body: Coordinate build slots, inspection points and handover information.
